name: cursor-zavod
description: Autonomous animated-cursor factory: trends → production → HMI portal → approval → marketplace.
author: Ex13m

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/cursorfx && npm run build -w portal
scripts.build:site: npm run build -w portal && node factory/lib/copydata.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/cursorfx && npm run typecheck -w portal
scripts.factory:daily: node factory/trends.js && node factory/produce.js && node factory/notify.js
